nasb.text: For this is a rebellious people, false sons, Sons who refuse to listen To the instruction of the Lord;

esv.text: For they are a rebellious people, lying children, children unwilling to hear the instruction of the Lord;

cnv.text: 因為這是悖逆的子民，不忠心的兒女， 不肯聽從耶和華教導的兒女。

ccb.text: 他们是悖逆的民族， 是说谎的儿女， 不肯听从耶和华的教导。

csbs.text: 因为他们是悖逆的子民，欺诈的儿女， 是不肯听从耶和华训诲的儿女。
